fidelity.reason: It preserves the before-classification decision, allowed information, privacy restriction, and harm-cost objective.
evidence_spans: before classifying a new content item
privacy-restricted attributes are unavailable unless consent and policy permit their use

managerial_framing.reason: The owner, threshold decision, error mechanism, and capacity trade-off are concrete.
evidence_spans: a moderation policy owner sets a review threshold
More review reduces classification harm but consumes scarce reviewer attention

scholarly_positioning.reason: The claimed contribution is novelty of context alone, without a changed mechanism, prior-knowledge relationship, or contribution type.
evidence_spans: same topic has not previously been studied in this particular context

evidence_discipline.reason: It explicitly limits the welfare and data-access assumptions and makes no empirical effectiveness claim.
evidence_spans: does not treat revenue as welfare or assume unrestricted access to sensitive data

prose_clarity.reason: The prose communicates the decision logic clearly.
evidence_spans: The threshold routes uncertain items to review

overall_reason: The research opportunity relies on generic new-context novelty and misses the required scholarly-positioning minimum.
